fields.summary: Creates a color space from CICP (Coding-independent Code Points) primaries and transfer characteristics.
fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace" /> described by the given CICP parameters, or <see langword="null" /> if the combination is not supported.

params.transferCharacteristics: One of the enumeration values that specifies the CICP transfer function.
params.colorPrimaries: One of the enumeration values that specifies the CICP color primaries.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace CreateCicp (SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp colorPrimaries, SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp transferCharacteristics);
